description.unified: Deals Physical DMG to enemies within range, knocking them back, and reduces their ATK by [24%->25%] and ATK Spd by [18%->20%] for 4sec.
For [17sec->14sec], increases all allies' Physical DEF by 98*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), Physical Block Chance by [140->150], and reduces Physical DMG taken by [11%->10%].
On Block, deals Physical DMG in front, reduces the target's ATK by [4%->3.5%] for 6sec, and increases your Physical DEF by [6%->9%]. These effects stack up to 4 times.

light.unified: Physical Defense increase amount increases by [40%->50%].

dark.unified: Physical Block Chance additionally increases by [110->100].

description.unified: [Shield Strike] reduces the P.DEF of hit enemies by 25% and their P.Crit Resist by [(added) 210] for 4 sec.
[Guardian Shield] [(added) increases effect duration by 4.5 sec] and [(removed) Removes negative effects from self and] boosts DEF increase by {0}%.

dark.unified: At the start of each battle, increases all allies' Max HP by [4%->10%]. This effect stacks up to 3 times and cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: Every 3 skills used, increases all allies' Physical Defense by {0}% and Attack by {1}% for 15 sec. The Physical Defense increase is applied at 2 times its value to the 4 allies with the lowest Physical Defense.
